name: Trota Di Pescatore Di Perle
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the trout in flour until well coated.
2. Heat oil in a large frypan. Saute fish for 5 minutes on each side over medium heat.
3. Melt butter in another pan. Add almonds and saute until light brown. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. To the fish, add wine, lemon juice, and pearl onions. Cook over low heat for a few minutes.
5. Test the fish by inserting a knife along the backbone. If it comes away easily, it is done.
6. Remove fish to serving platter. Season sauce with salt and pepper. Pour over fish.
7. Sprinkle with almonds and serve immediately.
